description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated wooden deck with rounded ends and a dark, grippy surface on top. The deck is mounted on two metal trucks, each holding a pair of small wheels, which are visible from the side views. The top surface appears to be covered with black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. The edges of the deck reveal a layered wood construction, typical of skateboards for strength and flexibility. The wheels are a light color and appear to be of the classic street type, suitable for urban environments. There are no visible graphics, logos, or decorative elements on the deck or wheels, giving it a minimalist appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip-taped wooden deck, light-colored street wheels, and no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: The skateboard is viewed from the short end, showing the rounded nose and the black grip tape surface.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the deck, the layered wood edge, and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_2: The opposite short end is visible, mirroring the rounded tail and grip tape seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Another side profile, identical to view 1, showing the deck, trucks, and wheels from the opposite side.
attribute_wheel_type: street, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver color, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
